Off Calendar Jul-08-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Continued To Apr-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Melbostad for Ronald Spinetti and S. Calvillo.
Sheila Robello for Thomas Brooks, Trustee.

The Court noted there are outstanding issues from the Probate Examiner. Mr. Melbostad stated that he didn't file anything because he could not reach Ms. Robello for discussion, that Mr. Brooks moved to Oceanside, that he will have to hire an attorney in San Diego County, that the only assets are worth $250,000.00, and that there was argument about replacing 2 deceased beneficiaries with 2 new ones. The Court noted there is a venue issue and that it would make sense for all to communicate. Mr. Melbostad inquired if Ms. Robello's client would be willing to mediate. Ms. Robello stated that question is not properly before the court, that venue will not be proper in 3 weeks and they are not in a position to proceed.

The Petition for order determining validity of trust amendment and instructing trustee is continued to April 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address probate examiner's notes.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
